question: Validate transaction date as the default Effective Date and identify whether either bank supplies a distinct posting date.
context: Resolved evidence gate. Initial fixtures expose transaction date only; one layout derives its omitted row years uniquely from statement period. No distinct posting/value-date column occurs in the evidence.
decision: All initial fixtures expose transaction date and no distinct posting/value-date column. Transaction date is the Effective Date. One layout derives omitted row years uniquely from its explicit statement period; any future distinct posting date is preserved separately without changing Effective Date.
